_comment: Section → module_id mapping for --sections CLI flag (Phase 17.1). Keys are section names used in the UI and CLI. Values are lists of module_id prefixes that belong to that section. The runner filters ctx.all_slides by matching slide_id prefixes against these.

overview.description: Portfolio composition, eligibility, and program scope

dctr.description: Current penetration, where opportunity sits, and what closing the gap is worth

rege.description: Opt-in rates, branch variation, and revenue impact of Reg E enrollment

attrition.description: Who is leaving, what it costs, and where retention efforts should focus

mailer.description: Campaign response rates, cohort lift, and mailer program ROI

value.description: Revenue attribution — what a debit card and Reg E opt-in are worth

insights.description: Synthesis, recommendations, and quantified action plan

competition.description: Competitor detection, wallet share analysis, and market positioning

ics.description: Invitation Checking System acquisition channels and conversion

_txn_sections: TXN sections below — only active when --product txn or combined

txn_general.description: Portfolio KPIs, demographics, ARS swipe segmentation

txn_competition.description: Competitor detection, wallet share, CU/bank audit

txn_campaign.description: Mailer + cohort lift from transaction data
